candidate_summary: One flame-keeper LLM F maintains persistent shared context state s_t; K participant LLMs in ordered voice-rotation; per turn t, participant_{t mod K} reads s_t + emits c_t; F updates s_{t+1}; continuous low-frequency anchor e_anchor; cohesion bonus L_coh. Inspired by Inuit qulliq hearth.
content_words: flame-keeper persistent shared context anchor LLM
cohesion bonus output-score with flame-keeper context

results.name: ALAS Stateful Multi-LLM
results.rationale: Stateful multi-LLM agent framework matches persistent shared state s_t across participant LLMs.

results.name: CaveAgent Stateful Runtime
results.rationale: Stateful runtime with persistent memory parallels flame-keeper maintaining s_t.

results.name: Token-Level Round-Robin Multi-Agent
results.rationale: Round-robin multi-agent matches ordered voice-rotation participant_{t mod K}.

results.name: RL Multi-Agent Orchestration Turn-Level
results.rationale: Turn-level reward parallels per-turn cohesion bonus L_coh.

results.name: MCP Multi-Agent Context Protocol
results.rationale: Multi-agent context protocol matches shared context state mechanism.

results.name: Collaborative Memory Multi-Agent
results.rationale: Collaborative memory across multi-agent matches persistent shared s_t.

results.name: Continuum Multi-Turn KV TTL
results.rationale: KV TTL caching is serving-layer; not voice-rotation or flame-keeper aggregation.

results.name: Multi-Turn Reasoning RL
results.rationale: Multi-turn reasoning is single-agent; lacks rotation and shared keeper state.

decision_rationale: 6/8 prior art hits with multiple crossing all three thresholds. Stateful multi-agent framework + round-robin + turn-level cohesion reward + persistent shared state fully covered. Qulliq metaphor doesn't introduce novel mechanism. Verdict: FAIL.
